banner.title: CBSE EXAMS POSTPONED (MARCH 2)
banner.subtitle: Official Notice Inside — 7 Gulf Countries Affected

cbse.summary: CBSE has officially postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in 7 Middle East countries. New dates to be announced after review on March 3.
cbse.issuedBy: Controller of Examinations, Dr. Sanyam Bhardwaj

embassies.note: Embassy is operating in emergency-only mode; regular consular services temporarily closed.

airlines.name: Air India
airlines.crisisNote: Major disruptions expected. Air India has cancelled multiple Gulf and international flights due to airspace closures. Check flight status before travel.

airlines.name: Air India Express
airlines.crisisNote: Select Gulf flights suspended through Mar 2 (23:59 IST). Check airline advisories and flight status before departure.

airlines.name: IndiGo
airlines.crisisNote: Select international flights via Middle East airspace suspended through Mar 2 (23:59 IST). Waivers/flexibility available for travel until Mar 7 for bookings made on/before Feb 28.

airlines.name: Akasa Air
airlines.crisisNote: Flights to/from Abu Dhabi, Doha, Jeddah, Kuwait, Riyadh suspended for Mar 2. Flexible rebooking/refunds for affected bookings.

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.crisisNote: Limited number of flights from evening 2 Mar; all other flights suspended until further notice. Rebook for travel on/before 20 Mar or request refund.

airlines.name: Etihad
airlines.crisisNote: Suspended: Abu Dhabi flights paused until 14:00 UAE time Wed, 4 Mar. Tickets issued on/before 28 Feb with travel up to 7 Mar: rebook free on Etihad-operated flights up to 18 Mar; refunds available for travel up to 7 Mar. Check flight status before heading to airport.

airlines.name: flydubai
airlines.crisisNote: Operations suspended until Mar 2 15:00 UAE time. Monitor airline updates and check flight status before travel.

airlines.name: Air Arabia
airlines.crisisNote: Operations suspended until Mar 2 15:00 UAE time. Check flight status and contact airline for refunds/rebooking.

airlines.name: Qatar Airways
airlines.crisisNote: Operations remain temporarily suspended due to Qatari airspace closure. Next update expected Mar 3 by 09:00 Doha time (06:00 UTC).

airlines.name: Saudia
airlines.crisisNote: Some regional disruptions possible due to airspace restrictions. Check flight status before departure.

airlines.name: Oman Air
airlines.crisisNote: Potential delays/cancellations due to airspace restrictions. Monitor airline advisories.

airlines.name: Gulf Air
airlines.crisisNote: Flights may face delays due to regional airspace closures. Check updates before travel.

advisories.title: Dubai airports limited operations resuming (DXB/DWC) + Emirates limited flights
advisories.summary: Dubai Airports says limited operations are expected to resume later on 2 Mar with a small number of flights at DXB/DWC; Emirates says limited flights from evening 2 Mar while other flights remain suspended until further notice (rebook for travel on/before 20 Mar or refund).

advisories.title: Dubai Airports: DXB & DWC operations suspended until further notice
advisories.summary: Dubai Airports announced that all flight operations at DXB and DWC are suspended until further notice due to regional airspace closures. Passengers should contact airlines for updates and avoid travelling to the airport without confirmation.

advisories.title: Qatar Airways: operations suspended; next update Mar 3 by 09:00 Doha
advisories.summary: Qatar Airways says flight operations remain temporarily suspended due to Qatari airspace closure. The airline expects to issue the next update by March 3 at 09:00 Doha time (06:00 UTC).

advisories.title: Etihad: flights to/from Abu Dhabi suspended until 14:00 UAE time (Mar 2)
advisories.summary: Etihad says all flights scheduled to depart and arrive at Abu Dhabi are suspended until 14:00 (2 PM) UAE time on March 2, subject to operational conditions. Guests can rebook free until March 15 for bookings made on or before Feb 28.

advisories.title: CBSE postpones March 2 board exams in 7 Gulf countries
advisories.summary: CBSE has officially postponed Class 10 and Class 12 board exams scheduled for March 2, 2026 in Bahrain, Iran, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and UAE. New dates will be decided after a review on March 3.

advisories.title: Doha embassy: emergency-only operations; regular consular services closed
advisories.summary: Embassy of India in Doha says it is operating in emergency-only mode and regular consular services are temporarily closed. Use emergency helplines/WhatsApp for urgent assistance.

advisories.title: DGCA advisory: avoid 11 FIRs until March 2
advisories.summary: DGCA has advised Indian operators to avoid flight operations in 11 Flight Information Regions (FIRs) due to the security situation, valid until March 2.

advisories.title: MEA advisory: foreign nationals in India to contact FRRO for visa extensions
advisories.summary: MEA advises foreign nationals in India affected by flight disruptions to contact the nearest FRRO for visa-related services including extensions.

resources.title: MADAD Portal (MEA)
resources.description: Register grievances and seek assistance from Indian missions abroad.

resources.title: Kerala NORKA Global Contact Center
resources.description: Kerala state helpdesk for expatriates and families.

madad.description: The MADAD portal helps Indian nationals abroad register grievances and seek support from Indian embassies/consulates.

meaCentral.description: MEA 24x7 Control Room for assistance and information.

disclaimer: This hub is for informational purposes only and may change rapidly. Always verify with official sources (airlines, airports, embassies, and government advisories) before travel.
madadDescription: The MADAD portal helps Indian nationals abroad register grievances and seek support from Indian embassies/consulates.
disclaimerNote: Personal emails are not displayed; use official helplines and listed embassy contacts.
